detaileddescription.para: If this callback is provided it will be called whenever the connection completes.

If this callback is provided it will be called whenever the connection gets disconnected, including when a connection gets rejected or cancelled or any error in SLC establishment. And the HFP HF object will be freed after the registered callback disconnected returned.
If this callback is provided it will be called whenever the SCO/eSCO connection completes.
If this callback is provided it will be called whenever the SCO/eSCO connection gets disconnected.
This callback provides service indicator value to the application

parameterdescription.para: service indicator value received from the AG.

detaileddescription.para: This callback provides the outgoing call status to the application.

briefdescription.para: HF call outgoing call is ringing Callback.

detaileddescription.para: This callback provides the outgoing call is ringing status to the application.
This callback provides the incoming call status to the application.

briefdescription.para: HF incoming call on hold Callback.

detaileddescription.para: This callback provides the incoming call on hold status to the application.
This callback provides the incoming/outgoing call active status to the application.
This callback provides the incoming/outgoing call reject status to the application.
This callback provides the incoming/outgoing call terminate status to the application.
This callback provides call held to the application
This callback provides call retrieved to the application
This callback provides signal indicator value to the application

parameterdescription.para: signal indicator value received from the AG.

detaileddescription.para: This callback provides roaming indicator value to the application

parameterdescription.para: roaming indicator value received from the AG.

detaileddescription.para: This callback battery service indicator value to the application

parameterdescription.para: battery indicator value received from the AG.

briefdescription.para: HF incoming call Ring indication callback to application.

detaileddescription.para: If this callback is provided it will be called whenever there is an incoming call.
This callback provides call dialing result to the application.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_hfp_hf_cb::clip) (struct bt_hfp_hf_call *call, const char *number, uint8_t type)
memberdef.name: clip

briefdescription.para: HF calling line identification notification callback to application.

detaileddescription.para: If this callback is provided it will be called whenever there is a unsolicited result code +CLIP. If CONFIG_BT_HFP_HF_CLI is not enabled, the unsolicited result code +CLIP will be ignored. And the callback will not be notified.

parameterdescription.para: Specify the format of the phone number.

briefdescription.para: HF microphone gain notification callback to application.

detaileddescription.para: If this callback is provided it will be called whenever there is a unsolicited result code +VGM. If CONFIG_BT_HFP_HF_VOLUME is not enabled, the unsolicited result code +VGM will be ignored. And the callback will not be notified.

briefdescription.para: HF speaker gain notification callback to application.

detaileddescription.para: If this callback is provided it will be called whenever there is a unsolicited result code +VGS. If CONFIG_BT_HFP_HF_VOLUME is not enabled, the unsolicited result code +VGS will be ignored. And the callback will not be notified.

briefdescription.para: HF in-band ring tone notification callback to application.

detaileddescription.para: If this callback is provided it will be called whenever there is a unsolicited result code +BSIR issued by the AG to indicate to the HF that the in-band ring tone setting has been locally changed.

parameterdescription.para: In-band ring tone status from the AG.

memberdef.definition: void(*)(struct bt_hfp_hf *hf, uint8_t id) bt_hfp_hf_cb::operator)(struct bt_hfp_hf *hf, uint8_t mode, uint8_t format, const char *operator); void(*codec_negotiate
memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_hfp_hf *hf, uint8_t mode, uint8_t format, const char *operator);void(*codec_negotiate
memberdef.name: operator)

briefdescription.para: HF network operator notification callback to application.

detaileddescription.para: If this callback is provided it will be called whenever there is a response code +COPS issued by the AG to response the AT+COPS? command issued by the HF by calling function bt_hfp_hf_get_operator.

parameterdescription.para: Format of the operator parameter string. It should be zero.
A string in alphanumeric format representing the name of the network operator.

detaileddescription.para: If this callback is provided it will be called whenever the response of ECNR turning off is received from AG. If CONFIG_BT_HFP_HF_ECNR is not enabled, the callback will not be notified.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_hfp_hf_cb::call_waiting) (struct bt_hfp_hf_call *call, const char *number, uint8_t type)
memberdef.name: call_waiting

briefdescription.para: HF call waiting notification callback to application.

detaileddescription.para: If this callback is provided it will be called whenever there is a unsolicited result code +CCWA. This notification can be enabled/disabled by calling function bt_hfp_hf_call_waiting_notify. If CONFIG_BT_HFP_HF_3WAY_CALL is not enabled, the unsolicited result code +CCWA will be ignored. And the callback will not be notified.

parameterdescription.para: Specify the format of the phone number.

detaileddescription.para: If this callback is provided it will be called whenever the unsolicited result code +BVRA is notified the HF when the voice recognition function in the AG is activated/deactivated autonomously from the AG. If CONFIG_BT_HFP_HF_VOICE_RECG is not enabled, the unsolicited result code +BVRA will be ignored. And the callback will not be notified.

If this callback is provided it will be called whenever the unsolicited result code +BVRA: 1,<vrecstate> is received from AG. <vrecstate>: Bitmask that reflects the current state of the voice recognition engine on the AG. Bit 0 - If it is 1, the AG is ready to accept audio input Bit 1 - If it is 1, the AG is sending audio to the HF Bit 2 - If it is 1, the AG is processing the audio input If CONFIG_BT_HFP_HF_ENH_VOICE_RECG is not enabled, the unsolicited result code +BVRA will be ignored. And the callback will not be notified.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_hfp_hf_cb::textual_representation) (struct bt_hfp_hf *hf, char *id, uint8_t type, uint8_t operation, const char *text)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_hfp_hf *hf, char *id, uint8_t type, uint8_t operation, const char *text)
memberdef.name: textual_representation

detaileddescription.para: If this callback is provided it will be called whenever the unsolicited result code +BVRA: 1,<vrecstate>, <textualRepresentation> is received from AG. <textualRepresentation>: <textID>,<textType>,<textOperation>, <string>. <textID>: Unique ID of the current text as a hexadecimal string (a maximum of 4 characters in length, but less than 4 characters in length is valid). <textType>: ID of the textType from the following list: 0 - Text recognized by the AG from the audio input provided by the HF 1 - Text of the audio output from the AG 2 - Text of the audio output from the AG that contains a question 3 - Text of the audio output from the AG that contains an error description <textOperation>: ID of the operation of the text 1 - NewText: Indicates that a new text started. Shall be used when the <textID> changes 2 - Replace: Replace any existing text with the same <textID> and same <textType> 3 - Append: Attach new text to existing text and keep the same <textID> and same <textType> <string>: The <string> parameter shall be a UTF-8 text string and shall always be contained within double quotes. If CONFIG_BT_HFP_HF_VOICE_RECG_TEXT is not enabled, the unsolicited result code +BVRA will be ignored. And the callback will not be notified.
If this callback is provided it will be called whenever the result code +BINP: <Phone number> is received from AG. If the request is failed, the number will be NULL.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_hfp_hf_cb::subscriber_number) (struct bt_hfp_hf *hf, const char *number, uint8_t type, uint8_t service)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_hfp_hf *hf, const char *number, uint8_t type, uint8_t service)
memberdef.name: subscriber_number

detaileddescription.para:
If this callback is provided it will be called whenever the result code +CUNM: [<alpha>],<number>, <type>,[<speed> ,<service>] is received from AG. <alpha>: This optional field is not supported, and shall be left blank. <number>: Quoted string containing the phone number in the format specified by <type>. <type> field specifies the format of the phone number provided, and can be one of the following values:
values 128-143: The phone number format may be a national or international format, and may contain prefix and/or escape digits. No changes on the number presentation are required.
values 144-159: The phone number format is an international number, including the country code prefix. If the plus sign ("+") is not included as part of the number and shall be added by the AG as needed.
values 160-175: National number. No prefix nor escape digits included. <speed>: This optional field is not supported, and shall be left blank. <service>: Indicates which service this phone number relates to. Shall be either 4 (voice) or 5 (fax).

briefdescription.para: Query list of current calls callback.

detaileddescription.para: If this callback is provided it will be called whenever the result code +CLCC: <idx>,<dir>,<status>,<mode>,<mprty>[,<number>,<type>] is received from AG. If the request is failed or no active calls, the callback will not be called. If the bt_hfp_hf_current_call::number is NULL, the bt_hfp_hf_current_call::type shall be ignored.
